name: GalaxyBots AI Directors
description: Fortune 500 Intelligence. For Everyone. Deploy an entire AI executive team — CFO, CMO, COO, Legal, HR, and more — directly in Claude Desktop.

tools.name: list_bots
tools.description: List all GalaxyBots AI Directors with their department, title, and description.

tools.name: get_bot
tools.description: Get the full profile of a specific AI Director by name or ID.

tools.name: send_message_to_bot
tools.description: Send a message to any AI Director and receive their expert response.

tools.name: analyze_task
tools.description: Submit a business objective to Optima Prime — receive a full team proposal with recommended Directors.

tools.name: create_task_session
tools.description: Launch a Task Room with a defined objective and a selected team of AI Directors.

tools.name: list_task_sessions
tools.description: View recent task sessions with status, team size, and objective.

tools.name: memory_search
tools.description: Search AI Director memory for past conversations, decisions, and context.

tools.name: pm_get_score
tools.description: Get the Cloud 9 AEO score for any URL across 9 AI engines.

tools.name: pm_request_scan
tools.description: Request a new AEO scan for a URL with real-time progress.

tools.name: pm_get_recommendations
tools.description: Retrieve AI-powered AEO improvement recommendations for a URL.

tools.name: pm_compare_urls
tools.description: Compare AEO scores for 2-5 URLs side by side.

tools.name: calculate_roi
tools.description: Calculate ROI of GalaxyBots AI Directors versus human executive salaries.

tools.name: get_pricing_recommendation
tools.description: Get the right GalaxyBots subscription tier for your company.

tools.name: generate_roi_report
tools.description: Generate a shareable one-page ROI report for your board.

tools.name: request_demo
tools.description: Book a live demo with the GalaxyBots team.

resources.name: GalaxyBots Social Proof
resources.description: Customer testimonials, case studies, and results data for GalaxyBots AI Directors.

prompts.name: executive_briefing
prompts.description: Generate an executive briefing using your AI Directors team.

arguments.name: topic
arguments.description: The business topic or challenge to brief on

prompts.name: aeo_audit
prompts.description: Run a full AEO audit for a website and get prioritized recommendations.

prompts.name: roi_analysis
prompts.description: Calculate and explain the ROI of deploying GalaxyBots AI Directors.

fields.label: GalaxyBots API Key
fields.description: Your GalaxyBots API key. Get one at https://galaxybots.ai/api-access

fields.label: Default Department
fields.description: The AI Director department to engage by default when starting a new session.

fields.label: Enable Usage Telemetry
fields.description: Share anonymous usage data to help improve GalaxyBots AI Directors.

featured_tools.name: send_message_to_bot
featured_tools.title: Consult Your AI CFO
featured_tools.description: Ask FinBot Forte to analyze your Q3 financials and recommend a cost reduction strategy.
featured_tools.example_prompt: Ask FinBot Forte to review my Q3 budget and identify three areas where we can reduce overhead without impacting growth.

featured_tools.name: pm_get_score
featured_tools.title: Check Your AI Visibility Score
featured_tools.description: See how your website ranks across 9 AI search engines with the Cloud 9 AEO score.
featured_tools.example_prompt: What is the AEO score for example.com? How does it compare to our competitors?

featured_tools.name: analyze_task
featured_tools.title: Build Your Executive Team
featured_tools.description: Describe a business challenge and Optima Prime will assemble the right team of AI Directors to tackle it.
featured_tools.example_prompt: We are expanding into the EU market next quarter. Which AI Directors should lead this initiative?
